titleStmt.title: SII 26.375: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 375. (A.R. No. 354 of 1909.) OLAKKŪR, TINDIVANAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records the following order made by the ūravar and the tāṉattār of Ulakkaiyūr alias Rājamahēndra-nallūr to the Kaikkōḷar of the street around the temple of the god Tiruvagattīśvara-muḍaiya nāyiṉār. It states that the Kaikkōḷar who had previously deserted the street might reoccupy the street again and continue their profession of weaving. While levying tax on them, a lease amount of 4 paṇam towards taṟikkaḍamai, vāśalpaṇam, śōḍi, śūla-vari, vāl-vari, talai-ārikkam, natta-vari, paḻa-vari, puduvari, pala-kāṇikkai and other taxes and one paṇam towards tax on cotton threads, (both) totalling to 5 paṇam, on every loom should alone be received for each year from the year Śukkiṟa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṉ Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa vipavaruṣam paṅkuṉi mātam pattāntiyati Ulakkaiyūrāṉa Irācamakentiranallūr Ūravarum tāṉattārum Ivvūr nāyaṉār tiruvaka
muṭaiyanāyiṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattil kaikkoḷaṟku kalluveṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭi Ivarkaḷ yiṟai Āṟṟāmal Oṭippoy tirumaṭaiviḷākamum pāḻāy nāyiṉārum pūcai ko
ḷḷāmal koyilumaṭaittukkiṭakkaiyil Iṉṉāḷ mutal tirumaṭaiviḷākattile kuṭiyum pukuntu taṟiyum Iṭṭu neyakkaṭavarkaḷākavum kaṭamai koḷḷu
miṭattu cukkiṟavaruṣam mutal cantirātittavaraikkum cella Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku taṟi Oṉṟukku koḷḷum taṟikkaṭamai vācal paṇam coṭi cūlavari
vālvari talaiārrikkam nattavari paḻavari putuvari palakāṇikkaiyum yuṭpaṭa cakalāyaṅkaṭkuk kuttakai Āka koḷḷum ø4m nūl Āyattukku koḷḷu
m ø1 Āka ø5 Ippaṇam Añcu Oḻiya Eṟakkoṇṭārruṇṭākil piṟama[ha]ttiyār tocam [ha]ttiyār .
Digital edition of SII 26.375 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
